title: LSH: Element-Observers Semantic Architecture with Emergent Execution
description: We present LSH (Lightcone Spacetime Hierarchy), a unified world model architecture based on the Element-Observers paradigm. The core insight is that everything is an Element: devices, rooms, observers, and even abstract concepts share a common structure. LSH implements a three-layer architecture: Structure Layer (Elements store objective properties), Rule Layer (Observers define perception rules), and Execution Layer (CMD_PERCEIVE executes perception computations). This architecture unifies knowledge representation across different domains and enables emergent scheduling through rule-based scoring. The element model supports decay-based self-recording where history emerges from current state rather than being stored separately.
